creator: kristinacors
caption: POV: You stop giving your best years to companies and start giving them back to yourself. #travelbucketlist #corporateburnout #careerpivot #fulltimetravel #travelcontentcreator

transcription.text: I don't know about you but I think this is real life, not this. Again, this, not this. So why do so many of us give our best years to jobs that drain us instead of spending time outside? Why is it that the things that actually make us happy are treated like distractions? I'm Christina and I went from corporate employee to travel content creator. I was sick of the monotony of being burnt out and exhausted and I set out to do something about it. After living a very conventional life, I went to Boston College, Columbia University, and started my career on Wall Street. I completely redesigned my life and now I slow travel full-time and I travel almost free by using credit card points and house sitting and a ton of strategies I learned along the way. Forbes even featured me for my travel hacks. I've been doing this for years but I still get so excited when I find people who get it. If that's you, comment so I can follow your journey too and follow for more strategies on how to get started doing the same.
